creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: gnome->x11

Correct the subject. Not clutter bug, which it's one of x11 stuff. You will 
need to attach your test.c to help the others to reproduce and figure what's 
going on with the crash. Also, you will need to reinstall all of your ports 
with the debug symbols (WITH_DEBUG=yes) to make your backtraces useful.
